query:
UPDATE transactions 
SET amount = 3142.21
WHERE userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'caduleitenet@gmail.com')
AND description LIKE '%Saldo Inicial%'
AND MONTH(FROM_UNIXTIME(date/1000)) = 4
AND YEAR(FROM_UNIXTIME(date/1000)) = 2026;
